data.title: Cleanup mytestplugin Plugin
data.description:
# Cleanup mytestplugin Plugin

## Problem Statement

The mytestplugin (appears to be a test/demo plugin) needs review as part of the marketplace-wide plugin audit.

## Findings

* Plugin located at `plugins/mytestplugin/`
* Likely test or example code
* Lower priority than production plugins

## Recommended Action

Determine if this should be kept, moved to examples, or removed. Clean up if keeping.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Decision made: keep, move, or remove
- [ ] If keeping: cleaned up and documented
- [ ] If moving: relocated appropriately
- [ ] If removing: deleted

## Work Log

### 2026-01-04 - Todo Created

**By:** Claude Code

**Actions:**

* Created cleanup todo as part of plugin audit initiative
